name: Indus Phase-12 — full deliverables (k-fold + ablations + negative controls)
description: Phase-12 successor to Phase-11. Wires every Phase-12 deliverable into one JSON-defined graph: (P12-1) Greek decode_separator='-' on recall/null/compound nodes so Linear B CV-syllable decodings join into hyphenated word forms that match the attested vocab. (P12-2) IconographicAnchorPin code_system='m77' for Tamil + Luwian so anchors fire on Mahadevan 1977 numeric sign IDs. (P12-3) Three Tamil SA ablation branches with compound_weight = {0.0, 0.5, 1.0} and matched miss_penalty = {0.0, 0.25, 0.5} sharing one fold-0 train/test split, yielding directly comparable recall + compound metrics. (P12-4) New KFoldRunner atomic node per language (k=5) replaces Phase-11's first-fold-only wiring with a true k-fold runner that internally calls SA + recall + compound and returns mean / std / 95% CI. (P12-5) Three negative-control branches off Tamil: CorpusPermuter (relabel), VocabularyAblator (empty), AnchorAblator. Recall on each should collapse to chance. (P12-6) MatchedWordReporter aggregates the three main per-language matched_words lists into one sortable table. (P12-7) IndusSignRoleClassifier logogram detector overhaul (high-freq + low positional variance + solo-rate threshold) — exposed via logogram_min_count / logogram_position_concentration / logogram_solo_rate params on the classifier node. (P12-8) Five Tamil SA branches with seeds 101..105, max_iterations=8000, restarts=4 — recalls aggregated via KFoldAggregator into mean / std stability metric. (P12-9) CorpusStratifier splits M77 by inscription length into short / medium / long; Tamil SA + recall run on each stratum. ShuffledLMNullDistribution per main language branch supplies z-scores; LMGranularityProfiler + GranularityComparison kept as diagnostics. Result is written to reports/indus_phase12_full.json.
